backend.changelog: SolidWorks now refuses to generate when it is connected to a different 3DEXPERIENCE platform than the BOM you are generating — instead of producing 'content not found on the platform you are logged into' errors and wrong outputs, it stops with a clear message to close SolidWorks or switch to the BOM's tenant. Works for every Generate path.

cadBridge.changelog: Reliability: reverts a too-aggressive stale-refresh change; SolidWorks tenant safety backstop retained. Stale part/assembly refresh is being redesigned safely.
